leads.title: SQL Fiddle - Online SQL Compiler for learning & practice
leads.snippet: SQL Fiddle is a web-based platform that lets you write, edit, and execute any SQL query. You can also use AI chat and SQL query generator to learn and practice SQL with different databases.

leads.title: SQL Playground: Write and Execute SQL Queries Online
